creator: mwlucas@michaelwlucas.com
text:
Booted 20170814 amd64 snapshot. Hit enter until I got to the Partitioning menu. 

Choose "Manual."

Note that the default partition type is freebsd-zfs. That's fine.

Choose "Finish."

"Your changes will now be written to disk" -yep, "commit."

Get the message: Error: No root partition was found. The root FreeBSD partition must have a mountpoint of '/'.

ZFS needs a root partition set? Seems fishy.
